popularStory.headline: Hamon Pecche and the Magna Carta
popularStory.description:
Hamon Pecche was born about 1194 in Cambridgeshire, England.  I have no idea how to pronounce Pecche.  In my mind I pronounce it Peachie, but it could just as easily have been Peck.

During Hamon’s li …

zh.Great Bealings, Woodbridge, Suffolk, Eng: 英國英格蘭素福爾可格亞特 比阿林斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne於1192年1月1日之後出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾包恩時，他的父親Gilbert de Pêche8855歲，母親Alice FitzWalter8841歲。他於1212年與Eve de Peverell在英國林可爾史爾可比結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1241年在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦亞u韓，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾聖 安德魯 馮 雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pecche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne was born after 1 January 1192, in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert de Pêche, was 8855 and his mother, Alice FitzWalter, was 8841. He married Eve de Peverell in 1212, in Corby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1241, in Yahūdhā, West Bank, Palestine, and was buried in St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne est né après 1 janvier 1192, à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Pêche, avait 8855 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzWalter, avait 8841 ans. Il a épousé Eve de Peverell en 1212, à Corby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1241, à Yahūdhā, Cisjordanie, Palestine, et a été enterré à St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne nach 1. Januar 1192 in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de Pêche 8855 und seine Mutter Alice FitzWalter 8841. Er hat 1212 in Corby, Lincolnshire, England Eve de Peverell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1241 in Yahūdhā, Westjordanland, Palästina und wurde in St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne è nato il dopo il 1 gennaio 1192 nel Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert de Pêche, aveva 8855 anni e il suo madre, Alice FitzWalter, aveva 8841 anni. Lui sposato Eve de Peverell nel 1212, nel Corby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1241, nel Yahūdhā, Cisgiordania, Palestina, e fu sepolto a St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourneが1192年1月1日以後にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Pêcheは8855歳，母Alice FitzWalterは8841歳であった。1212年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコルビーでEve de Peverellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1241年にパレスチナヨルダン川西岸地区ヤhuドhaで死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスト アンドリュー ス レスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne(이)가 1192년 1월 1일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 본에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Pêche(은)는 8855세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice FitzWalter(은)는 8841세였다. 그는 1212년 영국 링코실르 코르비에서 Eve de Peverell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 팔레스타인 팔레스타인 야hu드ha에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스트 앤드루 테 레스에 묻혔다.

pt.Great Bealings, Woodbridge, Suffolk, Eng: Great Bealings, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne nasceu após 1 de janeiro de 1192, em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert de Pêche, tinha 8855 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzWalter, tinha 8841 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve de Peverell em 1212, em Corby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1241, em Yahūdhā, Cisjordânia, Palestina, e foi sepultado em St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ст андрю т лесс, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne родился после 1 январь 1192 г. в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Pêche было 8855 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzWalter, 8841. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve de Peverell в 1212 г. в местности корби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1241 г. в местности яхuдхa, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина и был похоронен в местности ст андрю т лесс, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne nació después de 1 de enero de 1192, en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert de Pêche, tenía 8855 años y su mamá, Alice FitzWalter, tenía 8841 años. Se casó con Eve de Peverell en 1212, en Corby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1241, en Yahūdhā, Cisjordania, Palestina, y fue sepultado en St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
